name: openmind-capability-router
description: Open Mind's capability router, run through the Open Mind skill bridge in deterministic-floor mode (use_model=False). Given any query, route it to exactly one documented capability (glossary / structure / search) and ground the decision in the corpus's capability registry. The router can never select a capability outside the known set.

input.description: Any natural-language or identifier query to be routed.

fields.name: question
fields.description: The query to route, e.g. 'who calls post_entry'.

output.description: Structured JSON whose answer carries the full routing trace (capability, decided_by, deterministic_fallback, reason) and whose claim cites the documented registry line of the chosen capability.

tools.name: route_query
tools.description: Open Mind's deterministic routing floor: classify the query into one known capability, with a full decision trace.

tools.name: capability_registry
tools.description: Resolve the chosen capability to its documented registry line in the corpus (the grounding for the decision).

citationRequirement: The routing claim must cite the registry line ({file, line} in CAPABILITIES.md) documenting the chosen capability — a capability outside the documented set has no citable line and fails validation.
unsupportedClaimPolicy: The router must never invent a capability: its claim is citable if and only if the chosen capability exists in the documented registry. Runs in deterministic mode, so decided_by must never be 'model'.
failureBehavior: The router always returns a valid capability (unroutable queries fall back to 'search'), so the status is always answered; fabricating an unknown capability would surface as an uncited claim and fail the gate.
validationRules: Output must match the required JSON schema.
The claim must cite an existing registry line that names the chosen capability.
The expected capability for the test query must appear on the cited line.
Forbidden claims (invented capabilities, 'decided_by: model') must not appear in the output.
route_query must be called before capability_registry.
